meta.description: Let the assistant search the web on your behalf.

manifest.title: Tavily Search Tool
manifest.author: victor1203
manifest.description: This tool performs internet searches using the Tavily API to get real-time information with advanced context and Q&A capabilities

specs.name: search
specs.description:
Perform a Tavily search and return the results.

Args:
query: The search query string
search_type: Type of search to perform:
- regular: Standard search with full results
- context: Optimized for RAG applications
- qa: Quick answer to a specific question

Returns:
A formatted string containing the search results
